title: Amara Raja Batteries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Amara Raja Batteries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Quality Control Engineer looking for your next big career move? Amara Raja Batteries in Kolkata offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Amara Raja Batteries:
Amara Raja Batteries is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amara Raja Batteries!
